name: fullstack-starter
description: 🚀 Production-ready fullstack starter — React + NestJS + Supabase + PostgreSQL + Auth + CRUD. TypeScript everywhere.
author: Guy Boireau

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/api
